'''Iep Tumu''' was a [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] merchant who owned the ''[[Merasy]]''.

==Biography==
Iep Tumu had little talent for trading or for mechanics. Even if he owned the starship ''[[Merasy]]'', a [[Nova-Drive]] [[3-Z light freighter]], he performed no maintenance and was unable to stop an acceleration vibration on it.<ref name="Stock Ships" />

Tumu tried to obtain money through smuggling, but he has little talent for it either. Tumu was arrested in [[Brentaal IV/Legends|Brentaal IV]] and his ship was impounded. The Brentaalan authorities wanted to auction it, but Tumu's work had been so bad that the mechanics had to overhaul the ship before selling it.<ref name="Stock Ships" />
